name: High-Acid Fruit Wine Amelioration Election

eligibility.description: Applies to winemakers producing natural fruit or berry wines (other than grape) where the fruit has a natural fixed acid of 20 parts per thousand or more.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Winemakers can increase the volume of wine produced from high-acid fruits (20+ parts per thousand acid) by adding up to 60% ameliorating material (sugar/water) instead of the standard 35%.
